overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban environment. The player navigates covered walkways beneath elevated transit lines, crosses a sunlit intersection, and continues along streets lined with neon signs, karaoke bars, and industrial buildings while vehicles pass by.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway beneath elevated transit lines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange-textured sidewalk beneath the elevated transit structure

notable_agents.action: woman in white outfit walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

distinctive orange textured pavement with grid pattern
dark green metal industrial building facade with graffiti
yellow and red storefront signage for HOOD HEAVEN shop
large illuminated advertising screen displaying purple and pink graphics

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive elevated transit structure with orange textured pavement underfoot. The corridor features industrial green walls with graffiti, digital billboards overhead, and sparse pedestrian traffic moving in the opposite direction. The HOOD HEAVEN shop with its red and white striped awning appears on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: exits covered walkway into bright sunlit intersection with open sky
turns right at the intersection to proceed down a new street

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning right onto a new street with neon signage

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: wide open intersection with bright sunlight streaming through buildings
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt
building facade with bright pink neon lighting and signage
high-rise buildings with reflective glass surfaces visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a bright sunlit intersection. The camera crosses the asphalt crosswalk with yellow stripes, passing a black sedan, then turns right onto a new street. Tall glass towers rise in the background while a pink neon-lit building dominates the left side of the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with karaoke bar and vertical neon signage

events.description: enters covered street section with prominent green karaoke neon sign and teal buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing the karaoke establishment and various storefronts

entered.detail: tall vertical green neon sign with Japanese characters and KARAOKE text
teal-colored concrete building facade with industrial details
traffic signal showing green walk symbol for pedestrians
elevated pedestrian walkway or bridge connecting buildings overhead

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered commercial street dominated by a tall vertical green neon karaoke sign on the right. The teal-colored building features a green traffic light and purple awnings. Overhead, metal walkways and pipes crisscross between buildings while moderate vehicle traffic passes on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial warehouse district with blue buildings and overhead piping

events.description: transitions into industrial area with prominent blue warehouse building and large ventilation pipes

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street with moderate traffic passing by on the left, approaching distant structure

notable_agents.action: blue sports car with checkered pattern driving past the camera

entered.detail: large industrial warehouse with bright blue corrugated metal facade
massive cylindrical industrial pipes and ductwork running overhead
large architectural structure with arches visible at the end of the street
blue and silver industrial barrels and crates stacked on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking through an industrial warehouse district featuring a prominent bright blue building on the right with stacked metal barrels. Large ventilation pipes and industrial infrastructure dominate the overhead space. Vehicles including a blue sports car pass by on the left as the camera approaches a large distant metro station structure at the end of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a sheltered industrial corridor into a bright urban intersection and finally through a dense commercial and warehouse district. It begins beneath a massive elevated transit structure, moving past graffiti-covered green walls and the red-and-white awning of the Hood Heaven shop. As the camera emerges from the covered walkway, the environment opens into a sunlit intersection where the view expands to include towering glass skyscrapers and a prominent pink neon building. The scene then shifts back into a covered commercial street dominated by a vertical green karaoke sign and crisscrossing overhead pipes before turning toward an industrial zone. Finally, the camera passes a bright blue building and stacked metal barrels, moving alongside passing sports cars toward a large metro station structure in the distance.
